chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.S- 657 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on MA 1432/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 10.11.2025. None present for the petitioner. It transpires that on the last date of hearing this Bench had put the petitioner (called absent) on notice to this Court how this petition seeking production of the detenue in Thatta is maintainable before this Court. A perusal of the petition discloses that the private respondents No.5 to 7 are all residents of Thatta i.e. Village Saleh Muhammad Bhanbhro, P.O Chutto Chand, Taluka & District Thatta. Except for petitioner all the parties are based in Thatta. None are present for petitioner today. No intimation is received. In view of the above observations, this petition is returned to the petitioner for lack of territorial jurisdiction of this Court alongwith listed application to be filed before the proper forum. The C.P stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Tufail
